content:
🔊 ***As a reminder, please select your "language" role. The language channels and roles are almost finished, but we will not make this change anytime soon since we want to give everyone an opportunity to get these roles before the changes are implemented; otherwise, some channels may be invisible to you. This adjustment is very critical for the server's overall organization as it grows.***


🔊 ***温馨提示：请选择您的“语言”角色。语言频道和角色功能已基本完成，但我们不会很快进行更改，因为我们希望在正式实施前让所有用户都有机会获得这些角色；否则，某些频道可能对您不可见。随着服务器的发展，这项调整对服务器的整体组织至关重要。***

<id:customize>
